description: After native_lab_writeback_chen lands, GET /fhir/r4/Observation?subject=Patient/{chen-uuid}&category=laboratory must return >=4 Observation entries with LOINC codes matching the lipid panel analytes.
what_bug_this_catches: If the writer wires up the procedure chain but FHIR fails to surface it, the demo's chip-link beat dies. This case directly hits the FHIR endpoint and verifies the round-trip from upload through procedure_result to the laboratory Observation read path.

input.query: After upload, fetch FHIR Observation laboratory category entries for Chen.
